title: Radiant Italian Chicken Wrap
description: A winey, snappy Italian wrap with Sichuan pepper and steamed collard greens, perfect post-workout nourishment.
instructions: Place collard leaves in steamer basket over boiling water, cover, steam 2 minutes until pliable.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium heat, add minced garlic, and cook 30 seconds.
Add sliced chicken breast, season with salt, black pepper, and Sichuan pepper powder, and cook until browned and cooked through, about 5 minutes.
Deglaze the skillet with red wine, reduce by half, and stir in basil, lemon juice, and a pinch of salt.
Remove skillet from heat and stir in shredded Parmesan, adjusting seasoning as needed.
Spoon the chicken mixture onto each steamed leaf and top with additional Parmesan.
Fold the edges of the leaf over the filling and roll tightly.
Place wraps on a plate and serve immediately.
